roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, central APIs, GitHub publishing and D1 authority
roles.edge: web panels, reseller bots, customer miniapps and latency-sensitive request handling
roles.processor: reports, retry queue, backups and background jobs

fixes: move reseller BotFather/runtime synchronization out of the user response path
batch all initial customer miniapp queries into one Edge-to-Core database call
batch reseller management dashboard queries into one Edge-to-Core database call
combine user creation and lookup operations in database batches
move start-session cleanup and analytics writes to background tasks
extend safe in-memory caches for settings, reseller bot metadata and join status
keep request-triggered update checks away from Telegram webhook hot paths
store Bitpin API credentials encrypted with the existing application AES-GCM key
reject duplicate TXIDs and protect wallet crediting with idempotent ledger references
require administrator review before wallet credit because aggregate exchange balances cannot identify the depositing user
add the missing paymentCount element to the central finance view
guard the payment counter render so an optional UI element cannot break administrator login
make central login error rendering null-safe
title: رفع خطای ورود مدیریت مرکزی و تکمیل شمارنده پرداخت‌ها
notes: رفع خطای Cannot set properties of null هنگام ورود به مدیریت مرکزی
افزودن شمارنده پرداخت‌های بلوپال و واریزهای بیت‌پین در صفحه مالی
حفظ کامل امکانات اتصال بیت‌پین نسخه 3.0.5
